_comment: Machine-readable changelog for the bds-meta.json schema. AI agents should fetch this file, compare the latestVersion against their project's schemaVersion, and add any fields listed under versions newer than their current schemaVersion.
updateInstructions: Fetch this file. If your bds-meta.json schemaVersion is older than latestVersion, add all fields listed in the versions between your current version and latestVersion (inclusive). Set schemaVersion to latestVersion and update lastUpdated to today's date.

versions.description: Initial schema. Core project identity, component compliance, and known violations.
Added self-reported compliance fields for system operations, brand, and layout. These allow the Alignment Tracker to display a checklist score for each project.
versions.migrationNote: Add the systemOps, brand, and layout blocks with all values set to false, then audit your project and set each field to true when the condition is met. See https://bds.exponentialroadmap.org/tracker for the full checklist with what/why for each field.
